content: 1) Reescribir football_h2h_decision_policy.py: tabla recalibrada (baseline+min_sample+STRONG labels), get_active_rules() con env override, POLARITY_PAIRS, DNB_OVERLAP_PAIR, MAX_H2H_POINTS_TOTAL
